#5 BENSON/HOLMES: C/C FOR HRG. JUDGE ISSUES TENTATIVE DECISION. DEFT REQUESTS STATEMENT OF DECISION. CASE CONT'D TO 8-29-94 FOR DEFT TO FILE PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION. EXHIBITS & SUP CT DEPOSITIONS RETAINED BY COURT.

ORDER OF THE COURT. THE COURT HAVING RECEIVED EACH PARTY'S PROPOSED STATEMENT OF DECISION AND PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS AND PROPOSLS, IT IS ORDERED THAT THE COURT'S TENTATIVE DECISION SHALL BE THE STATEMENT OF DECISION. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY IS ORDERED TO TYPE UP AND SERVE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF THE MAILING OF THIS ORDER THE COURT'S TENTATIVE DECISION AS SET FORTH IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT (P. 3 1.15 THROUGH P. 9 1.20) IN PRLOPER FORM AS THE STATEMENT OF DECISION. THIS ORDER IS TO BE MAILED TO BOTH ATTORNEYS FORTHWITH. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY TO PREPARE JUDGMENT. DATED SEPT. 14, 1994. JEROME T. BENSON JUDGE OF THE MUNICIPAL COURT. ORDER OF THE COURT.
